name: Ted Cruz
subject: Gift for Hillary?
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Do you have friends
who support Hillary Clinton? That family member who wants to
debate you at the Christmas dinner table? Or know a co-worker who
owns a car with a faded Obama bumper sticker?

If so, then I have
just the thing for you!

In case you missed it
before - take a look at the amazing, festive sweater we unveiled
last week:

The best Christmas
presents are unique, memorable, and personal and our campaign's
Christmas Sweater is all three. I'm sure they'll appreciate the
thought behind the gift.

And, since we're in
the giving spirit here at Ted Cruz for President, we've built a
special 10% off promo code-"WINTERCRUZ" -for you to use
store-wide when you check out.

Christmas will be
here before you know it, so don't wait! Go to our online store
today so you receive your sweater in time for all of this year's
holiday parties.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

www.tedcruz.org

Copyright © 2015 All Rights
Reserved | Privacy Policy

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Team Jeb
subject: New member: Friend
body:
Friend - With only 57 days until the Iowa caucuses and 65 days until the New Hampshire primary, we're kicking into high gear.

We have 14 field offices spread out across Iowa, South Carolina, New Hampshire and Nevada, but it takes significant resources to keep them running every day.

That's why we need a special group of supporters to become Founding Field Members. With the help of our Founding Field Members, we'll execute the most advanced ground game of any campaign in the country.

[**Will you chip in $50, $25, $5, or even just $1 right now and become a Founding Field Member to help Jeb 's ground game in Iowa, New Hampshire and beyond.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cpprvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsptjhj_olrwwmqf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

If you chip in in the next 48 hours, here's what you'll get in return:
* We'll add your name to the donor wall in our field offices to show all our volunteers you stepped up.
* We'll send you updates from the office. This may be as simple as pizza fueled Super Saturday calls, or confidential polling and strategy memos.
* You'll get access to our exclusive tele-town halls and strategy calls.

**As you can see, it 's a big responsibility, so we don't ask lightly, but we know we can trust you to step up.**

[**Can we add your name to one of our Founding Field Member walls, Friend? All you have to do is contribute $50, $25, $5, or even just $1 now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cpdrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsptjhq_olrwwmqf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

The ground game wins elections, Friend. That's what your Membership will fund: Our Victory.

Become a Founding Field Member and help Jeb now: [**Jeb2016.com/Founding-Field-Member/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rncfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbsnctjl_olrwwmqf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you,

Team Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ymvryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwqsbsm_olrwwmqf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=6231&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Rand Paul
subject: They just won't learn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot:

Eight years after No Child Left Behind's
expiration, members of BOTH parties still refuse to learn.

Next week, the U.S. Senate will vote on the
so-called "Every Student Succeeds Act," billed as a grand
bipartisan "deal" that's destined to fail as badly as every other
federal government incursion into education.

Patriot, with your support, I'm going to do
everything in my power to stop this scheme.

If you stand with me, I hope you'll agree to
your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right
away.

When No Child Left Behind passed in 2001, it
marked an ugly new turn in Big Government Republican governance.

In the days of Ronald Reagan, conservatives
stood united in the belief that education was best left up to
states, localities and parents.

After all, under the Constitution's Tenth
Amendment, the federal government is to have no role in
education.

The founding of the Department of Education
under Jimmy Carter had resulted in nothing more government, more
spending and fewer results.

Yet, at the direction of George W. Bush, my
party passed the Big Government, big spending No Child Left
Behind scheme into law, DOUBLING the Department of Education.

Today, virtually everyone understands that
this monstrosity has been an utter disaster.

But now, you and I could be just days away
from seeing Republicans help pass its successor..

If passed, the "Every Student Succeeds Act"
would keep in place No Child Left Behind's testing requirements,
continue to accelerate spending with money we just don't have and
continues K-12 program authorizations for another four years.

Not only that, but this legislation even
creates new federal education programs and opens the door to
federal government involvement in pre-K education!

It's 1,069 pages of the worst the Washington
machine has to offer.

Patriot, as we've seen from the Common Core
fiasco -- which some of my opponents in this Presidential primary
race still support -- this is the exact wrong prescription for
our education woes.

We need competition in education.

We need local school boards working with
teachers and parents innovating finding out what works, and less
involvement from power-hungry educrats and politicians in
Washington.

I'm committed to fixing education, not piling
on.

I think it's just too critical of a matter to
entrust with Washington, D.C.

But the truth is, few Republicans are serious
about returning education to states and local parents and
teachers.

I am.

I will continue to fight to eliminate the
Department of Education.

That's why it's so important who you choose
in this race for president.

I believe we need someone with bold ideas and
a record of fighting for them.

No one else compares.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

GIVE $10 TODAY >>

GIVE $25 TODAY >>

GIVE $50 TODAY >>

GIVE $100 TODAY >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Add your name: Protect our environment
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friend --

Right now, 150 heads of state are converging in Paris for the United Nations Conference on Climate Change.

The world is watching, and now is time for the United States to be at the front of the push for clean, renewable energy -- and encourage our global community to join us.

Add your name and stand with me in my fight for a healthier and safer environment for generations to come.

https://act.myngp.com/Forms/3251881505449836544?ms=20151206&refcode=e20151206&refcode2=e20151206&amount=15

I've spent my career fighting to protect our environment and leave our children the clean-energy future they deserve. As President Clinton's top environmental advisor, and later chair of the White House Council on Environmental Quality, I made clean energy and common-sense climate protections my priority.

But this goes beyond environmental effects. We have the chance to make life easier for hardworking families across the country.

Investing in the clean energy economy will allow us to cut electricity costs for taxpayers and create good jobs for those struggling under our current economy.

It's time for the United States to step up and take our place as a world leader on issues of environmental protection.

I know that we can reduce global pollution, create green jobs, and leave our children with a safe, healthy environment.

Add your name and demand that the United States step up and take our place as a world leader in the push for clean, renewable energy.

https://act.myngp.com/Forms/3251881505449836544?ms=20151206&refcode=e20151206&refcode2=e20151206&amount=15

Sincerely,

Katie

DONATE

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20151206&refcode2=e20151206&amount=15

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-8353903427297738752/2576924302506983424.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Adam G., MarcoRubio.com
subject: I won & you can too, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45252908:JFwAuxLNU:m:1:1349778030:14463446CF525EB2580C74C33AD56FB9:r)
---
| | | | Peter -- I seriously doubted that I could ever win something like this. So, imagine how I felt getting a call last month from the Rubio campaign that I had won the Colorado Debate Contest and would get to see Marco on the debate stage in person.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45252907:JFwAuxLNU:m:1:1349778030:14463446CF525EB2580C74C33AD56FB9:r)
---
| The whole experience was surreal, in a good way. My dad and I agreed: Watching Marco win his third debate in a row from inside the arena was totally different than watching on TV. It didn't hurt that the campaign took care of everything.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45252907:JFwAuxLNU:m:1:1349778030:14463446CF525EB2580C74C33AD56FB9:r)
---
| For me, this contest proved that anyone can win stuff like this, as long as they give it a shot. So my advice to you is to take the chance: **[If you click here to donate $10 or more, you'll be automatically entered.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45252907:JFwAuxLNU:m:1:1349778030:14463446CF525EB2580C74C33AD56FB9:r)** Good luck! Adam GColorado Debate Contest Winner P.S. **[The contest ends in TWO days, so don't miss your chance to enter by clicking here and donating.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45252907:JFwAuxLNU:m:1:1349778030:14463446CF525EB2580C74C33AD56FB9:r)**

---
| Nevada Debate Contest Rules
* Contest ends December 8, 2015.
* Limit one entry per individual
* Make a contribution and also enter
* You can also enter **[here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45252906:JFwAuxLNU:m:1:1349778030:14463446CF525EB2580C74C33AD56FB9:r)** without making a contribution.
* See full terms & conditions below.

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, **[click](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45252907:JFwAuxLNU:m:1:1349778030:14463446CF525EB2580C74C33AD56FB9:r)**[**here**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45252907:JFwAuxLNU:m:1:1349778030:14463446CF525EB2580C74C33AD56FB9:r). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on December 8, 2015. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Las Vegas, Nevada on December 15, 2015; roundtrip airfare for the winner and a guest; hotel accommodations for winner and guest . Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjQxNzEzODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNjM0MDY0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjQxNzEzODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNjM0MDY0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQxNzEzODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNjM0MDY0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQxNzEzODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNjM0MDY0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQxNzEzODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNjM0MDY0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQxNzEzODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNjM0MDY0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjQxNzEzODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNjM0MDY0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQxNzEzODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNjM0MDY0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQxNzEzODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNjM0MDY0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Got an opinion? We know you do. | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors. Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjQxNzE1ODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNjQ1OTM5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQxNzE1ODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNjQ1OTM5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe.
